title: Walltime overrun forecast for own job
difficulty_justification: Single slurm.job_details call returns the user's own running job along with the AIOps-attached predicted_walltime field; no aggregation or chaining needed.
query_text: My job 910803 is still running. Will it finish before its requested walltime, or is it on track to be killed by TIMEOUT?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Job 910803 is at 78% of its requested 12-hour walltime with 22% of work remaining; the AIOps walltime model predicts completion at 11h 14min - within budget by ~46 minutes. No TIMEOUT predicted, but headroom is tight.

checkpoints.description: Agent retrieves job 910803 and consults the attached walltime forecast.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains slurm.job_details(job_id=910803) and final_answer references the AIOps prediction

checkpoints.description: Diagnosis correctly states the job is on track but with tight headroom.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer is consistent with completion under the requested walltime
